IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THEPKAYSONE, BOUNCHANH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DAVIS AMUSEMENT CO. $9,322.96 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,322.96, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT
